failure.expected: Numeric table: 7 energy values [28, 69, 219, 346, 359, 408, 489], midpoint threshold candidates, left/right counts, MCR per threshold.
failure.captured: Conceptual prose describing the algorithm (steps, midpoint logic, complexity).
failure.recommended_action: Re-extract with an explicit instruction to read the data-table region, not the explanation text boxes. A vision pass on the table is preferable.

transcription.WS10_B1: Tüm olası eşik değerlerini sırayla deneriz.
transcription.WS10_B3: En düşük MCR'yi veren eşik seçilir.
transcription.WS10_B4: Sistematik arama, gözden kaçan değer kalmamasını sağlar.
transcription.WS10_B5: Veri sıralanır ve her iki komşu değer arasındaki orta nokta eşik adayı olarak alınır.
transcription.WS10_B6: Bu sayede sonsuz değil sonlu sayıda eşik denenir.
transcription.WS10_B7: 10 adet farklı değer varsa en fazla 9 eşik adayı olur.
transcription.WS10_B8: Algoritma O(n log n) karmaşıklığında çalışır çünkü önce sıralama yapılır.

page_flags: The numeric table the student filled was not captured. The text above is the algorithm-explanation region.

gate_2_validation.blocked_reason: Gate 1 captured the wrong region; the numeric table required for validation is missing.

coverage.note: Counts refer to the required table cells, none of which were captured.

gate_2_validation.engagement_note: The captured prose (treated as student-written algorithm description) is conceptually strong: correct 3-step search, correct n-1 candidate bound, plausible O(n log n) claim. This is informative but cannot substitute for the table.

best_effort_conceptual.caveat: Scored only as evidence of conceptual understanding. These cells are not the WS10 table and do not count toward the worksheet credit band.

WS10_B4.evidence: Sistematik arama, gözden kaçan değer kalmamasını sağlar.

WS10_B5_B7.evidence: ...orta nokta eşik adayı... 10 farklı değer varsa en fazla 9 eşik adayı olur.

WS10_B8.evidence: Algoritma O(n log n) karmaşıklığında çalışır çünkü önce sıralama yapılır.

gate_3_scoring.scoring_note: Worksheet credit is blocked. The conceptual prose is strong but does not verify that the student applied the algorithm to the energy dataset. Re-extract the table.

gate_4_aicft_evidence.scope_note: Per-worksheet LO evidence only, from conceptual text only. No level is assigned here.

LO3.2.2.note: O(n log n) complexity claim links sorting to efficiency; beyond expected level but from misextracted text.

gate_4_aicft_evidence.portfolio_contribution: Conceptual understanding looks strong, including a complexity insight unique in the sequence. The numeric table must be re-extracted before this counts as verified application.
